news.headline: US Border Patrol chief resigns, in latest Trump team shake-up
news.summary:
The head of US Border Patrol, the agency tasked with securing the nation’s frontiers and increasingly tapped by the Trump administration for immigration operations in American cities, announced his resignation Thursday.

news.headline: Nigel Farage, Leader of Reform UK, Says £5 Million Gift Was ‘Reward’ for Brexit
news.summary: Nigel Farage, the leader of the populist right-wing party, had previously said the money was for personal security.
